title: juncus maritimus var. rigidus
intro: Juncus maritimus var. rigidus, also known as rigid sea rush, is a type of plant that belongs to the Juncaceae family and is commonly found in coastal areas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of rigid sea rush include its ability to help reduce swelling and ease respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Rigid sea rush can be prepared as an herbal infusion, tincture, or salve, and is often used to treat a variety of ailments.
